query:
INSERT INTO learning_path_courses (pathId, courseId, orderIndex)
SELECT 2, c.id, 
  CASE c.title
    WHEN 'Christian Leadership' THEN 1
    WHEN 'The Fivefold Ministry' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Prayer and Intercession' THEN 3
    WHEN 'Church Administration' THEN 4
  END
FROM courses c
WHERE c.title IN ('Christian Leadership', 'The Fivefold Ministry', 'Prayer and Intercession', 'Church Administration')
